item.title: Make Eyes Look Rounder with a Simple Step

item.title: Less is more for a creaseless makeup finish
item.description: Dust off the excess and press lightly for a creaseless finish that lasts all day long. A simple makeup tip for a smoother look.

media:content.media:description: Dust off the excess and press lightly for a creaseless finish that lasts all day long. A simple makeup tip for a smoother look.
